wiki.extract: Supermercados Internacionales HEB, S.A. de C.V. is the Mexican division of H-E-B, a private supermarket chain based in San Antonio, Texas, U.S. It competes mainly with Soriana, Walmart México, Bodega Aurrerá, S-Mart, Chedraui and Casa Ley.

recalls.productName: Destination Holiday Glow Light Stick Bracelets
recalls.reason: The green glow stick bracelet within the 12-pack container can leak, posing a skin irritation hazard.

cases.caseName: Merritt v. H-E-B Grocery Company, LP
X One, Inc. v. H-E-B, LP
H-E-B LP v. Superior Ice Cream Equipment, LLC

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was cutting a 15-pound piece of ribeye on a saw. The blade of the saw contacted the employee's right hand causing a partial amputation to the middle finger and injury to the index finger requiring stitches.

sampleRecords.event_description: Injured by object pushed or pulled by person
sampleRecords.final_narrative: Two employees were pulling a stock cart filled with product out of a meat cooler. One employee pushed the cart and the other employee's right arm was caught between the cart and an asset-protector bollard. He sustained a fractured upper right arm.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was cutting meat on a band saw when their left index finger was partially amputated.

sampleRecords.nature: Effects of poison, toxic, or allergenic exposure  unspecified
sampleRecords.event_description: Inhalation of harmful substance  single episode or single shift
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was cleaning the produce production room. The employee was spraying a grease cutter chemical when it mixed with an antimicrobial agent in a jug under a sink. The injured employee was called over to assess the situation, picked up the jug of antimicrobial agent, and inhaled the vapors from the chemical mixture. The injured employee was hospitalized.

sampleRecords.event_description: Injured by object pushed or pulled by person
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was in the cooler, loading a cart with boxed meat products. The employee was exiting the cooler with the cart when his right hand got caught between the cart and the doorframe of the cooler. The employee's right middle finger was amputated.
